tree.name: Domantas Sabonis
tree.tradeDescription: Kings traded Tyrese Haliburton, Buddy Hield, and Tristan Thompson to Pacers for Domantas Sabonis, Justin Holiday, Jeremy Lamb, and a 2023 2nd round pick (Jordan Walsh). Indiana also received a trade exception.
tree.note: All-Star center, originally drafted 11th overall by Orlando in 2016

assetsGivenUp.name: Tyrese Haliburton
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 12th overall from Iowa State

assetsGivenUp.name: Buddy Hield
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded DeMarcus Cousins and Omri Casspi to Pelicans for Buddy Hield, Tyreke Evans, Langston Galloway, a 2017 1st round pick (Zach Collins, top-3 protected), and a 2017 2nd round pick (Frank Mason III, PHI own)
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally drafted 6th overall by New Orleans in 2016

assetsGivenUp.name: Omri Casspi
assetsGivenUp.note: Forward re-signed as free agent (second stint with Kings)

assetsGivenUp.name: Tristan Thompson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: SAC sent Delon Wright to ATL; ATL sent Kris Dunn, Bruno Fernando, and a 2023 2nd round draft pick (Julian Phillips, POR own) to BOS; BOS sent Tristan Thompson to SAC. Boston also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Delon Wright
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Cory Joseph, a 2021 2nd round pick (Luka Garza, LAL own), and a 2024 2nd round pick (SAC own, did not convey) to Pistons for Delon Wright. Sacramento also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick via LAL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Kenyon Martin Jr. to Rockets for cash and a 2021 2nd round pick (LAL own, Luka Garza)
assetsGivenUp.note: LAL own, acquired from HOU via Kenyon Martin Jr. trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via SAC
assetsGivenUp.note: Sacramento's own 2nd round pick, did not convey
